factionAbilities.name: ASSIMILATE
factionAbilities.effect: When you gain control of a planet, replace each PDS and space dock that is on that planet with a matching unit from your reinforcements.

factionAbilities.name: HARROW
factionAbilities.effect: At the end of each round of ground combat, your ships in the active system may use their Bombardment abilities against your opponent's ground forces on the planet.

versions.timing: At the start of your turn:
versions.effect: Remove 1 token from the L1Z1X player's strategy pool and return it to his reinforcements. Then, place 1 command token from your reinforcements in your strategy pool. Then, return this card to the L1Z1X player.

versions.timing: When you gain command tokens during the status phase:
versions.effect: Gain 1 additional command token. Then, return this card to the L1Z1X player.

factionTechnologies.name: Inheritance Systems
factionTechnologies.effect: You may exhaust this card and spend 2 resources when you research a technology; ignore all of that technology's prerequisites.

abilities.name: Direct Hit Immunity
abilities.effect: This unit cannot be destroyed by 'Direct Hit' action cards.

abilities.name: Priority Targeting
abilities.effect: During a space combat, hits produced by this ship and by your dreadnoughts in this system must be assigned to non-fighter ships if able.

abilities.name: Ground Bombardment
abilities.effect: While not participating in ground combat, this unit can use its BOMBARDMENT ability on planets in its system as if it were a ship.

breakthrough.name: Fealty Uplink
breakthrough.synergy: When you gain control of a planet, place infantry from your reinforcements equal to that planet's influence value on that planet.

agent.name: I48S
agent.ability: After a player activates a system: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to replace 1 of their infantry in the active system with 1 mech from their reinforcements.

commander.name: 2RAM
commander.ability: Units that have PLANETARY SHIELD do not prevent you from using Bombardment.

hero.name: The Helmsman
hero.ability: DARK SPACE NAVIGATION — ACTION: Choose 1 system that does not contain other players' ships; you may move your flagship and any number of your dreadnoughts from other systems into the chosen system. Then, purge this card.
